meaning: adj.罗马教皇的,教皇制度的
examples: But the papal decree goes much further.
Full Papal Bow Fully prostrate, while kissing the runway.
Some young punk at Sunday Mass tried to Papal Pound me.
Based in Rome from 1978-1979, he covered two Papal transitions and the travels of Pope John Paul II.
The reformers have become emboldened by an investigation into the leaking of papal documents.
